creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
When connecting with IWN Intel WiFi interface in my Dell Latitude E4310,
very often I need to kill and restart wpa_supplicant in order to get back
the connection. It seems that wpa_supplicant cannot hold the active connection...

% wpa_supplicant -v
wpa_supplicant v0.7.3
